name: Seagull S6 Original Acoustic Guitar
introText: The Seagull S6 is made in Lasalle, Quebec — solid cedar top, wild cherry back and sides, custom polished nut, and a compensated saddle for better intonation than most guitars at twice the price. The best intermediate acoustic guitar from a Canadian builder.
whatWorks: Solid cedar top is warmer and more responsive than spruce at this price — cedar is a softer tonewood that opens up faster than spruce, producing a warm, rich tone immediately rather than requiring years of break-in. It's particularly suited to fingerpicking, folk, and classical guitar styles.

Compensated bone saddle improves intonation at every fret — the compensated saddle offsets the B string and G string to correct for inherent pitch discrepancies in standard saddle design. The result is a guitar that plays in tune up the neck, which is uncommon at this price.

Made in Quebec, Canada — all Seagull guitars are built in Lasalle, Quebec, by Godin Guitars. Canadian manufacturing means humidity-acclimated construction for Canadian climates and straightforward warranty and service access.

44mm nut width is more comfortable for fingerpicking — the slightly wider nut spacing gives fingerstyle players more room to place fingers between strings without accidentally muting adjacent notes. Flatpickers prefer 43mm; fingerstyle players often prefer 44mm.
worthKnowing: Seagull headstock design is polarizing — the distinctive asymmetric Seagull headstock is an intentional design choice to reduce neck-dive by balancing the weight. Some players love the Canadian uniqueness; others prefer traditional symmetrical headstocks.

Cedar top scratches more easily than spruce — cedar is a softer tonewood, which is why it opens up tonally faster, but also means it's slightly more susceptible to surface scratches and dings. The gloss finish provides some protection.
Wider 44mm nut slightly more challenging for smaller hands — players with smaller hands may find the 44mm nut width stretching first-position chord shapes slightly more than standard 43mm guitars.

Rosewood fingerboard availability note — all current Seagull S6 production uses legally certified rosewood sources compliant with CITES regulations. The tonewood is genuine rosewood, not a substitute.

commonComplaints.title: Asymmetric headstock design controversial…
commonComplaints.body: Asymmetric headstock design controversial — the distinctive Seagull headstock is functional and intentional but some players find it visually unusual compared to symmetrical designs from Gibson or Fender-style guitars.

commonComplaints.title: Cedar top scratches more easily than spruce…
commonComplaints.body: Cedar top scratches more easily than spruce — the softer cedar tonewood is slightly more susceptible to cosmetic damage from picks, fingernails, or belt buckles than harder spruce-top alternatives.

commonComplaints.title: Wider nut challenging for smaller hands…
commonComplaints.body: Wider nut challenging for smaller hands — the 44mm nut width requires slightly longer reach for first-position chord shapes, which can be uncomfortable for players with smaller or younger hands.

verdict: The Seagull S6 is the best acoustic guitar at $599 for players who value tone, intonation, and Canadian quality. The solid cedar top, compensated saddle, and Tusq nut represent upgrades that most competing guitars at this price don't include. If you're buying a Canadian-made acoustic guitar that will last 20 years and sound better every year, the S6 is the right choice.

realBuyers.quote: 15 years with this guitar. It sounds dramatically better now than when I bought it. Cedar tops are alive — they breathe and improve with age. This one is extraordinary.
The intonation is perfect all the way up the neck. My previous $400 guitar was out of tune by the 7th fret. The compensated saddle on the Seagull makes a real difference.
Made in Quebec, great Canadian woods, excellent warranty, great tone. This guitar makes me proud to support a Canadian instrument maker.

sources.title: Seagull S6 vs Fender CD-60S — YouTube

metaDescription: Seagull S6 Original review for Canada: solid cedar top, wild cherry, compensated saddle, 44mm nut, made in Quebec. ~$599 CAD on Amazon.ca. Best Canadian acoustic guitar.
